_note: SYNTHETIC patient-voice narrative (as chatty-notes would emit) — answer-free. Describes symptoms/history in the patient's own words; NEVER names the diagnosis. objective_data_offered are patient-obtainable readings as strings; clinician-only findings are NOT here.
opening_complaint_text: I've been getting really puffed out just walking to the letterbox the last week or so, and my ankles have blown up like balloons. I had to sleep sitting up in the chair last night because I couldn't breathe lying flat.
stated_reason: My daughter got worried and told me to get seen today.

symptom_narrative.onset: been creeping up over the past week or two
symptom_narrative.duration: about ten days, worse the last three
symptom_narrative.character: like I just can't get a full breath
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: pretty scary, worse than my usual puff
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: my chest feels tight and my legs are heavy and swollen
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: worse at night and when I lie down
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: the swelling in my ankles, and I've put on a few kilos this week
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've been a bit puffy before but never this bad
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: can't do my shopping or get up the back step without stopping

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: my kidneys aren't the best, the doctor watches them

social_history.relevant_life_context: lives alone since my husband passed

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Paroxysmal nocturnal dyspnoea — wakes breathless and must sit up
trigger_question_examples: Do you ever wake up in the night gasping for breath?
Does lying flat make your breathing worse at night?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Now that you ask — yeah, a couple of nights I've woken up gasping and had to sit right up on the edge of the bed to get my breath.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Progressive ankle and leg oedema with weight gain
trigger_question_examples: Have you noticed any swelling anywhere?
Any changes in your weight recently?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My ankles have really puffed up, and my rings are tight — I reckon I've gone up a few kilos in just this week.
